name: Rand Paul
subject: One heck of a fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot:

Let's face it.
When it comes to nominating a new Supreme
Court nominee, President Obama is facing a huge conflict of
interest.
Maybe the biggest of his presidency.
And I'm going to do everything I can to make
sure the Senate does what is necessary to uphold the
Constitution.
Many of the president's own executive actions
on immigration, climate change, and Obamacare, are under review
by the Supreme Court right now.
Patriot, we already know how Obama wants them
to rule.
He thinks he should have the power basically
to create immigration law out nothing.
He thinks he has the power to basically
cripple entire industries like coal without ever having been
given that power by Congress.
It's a complete Constitutional debate on
whose powers it is to legislate right now. Is it the president or
Congress?
His entire philosophy of law is up for debate
and it will be decided where? At the Supreme Court.
What I see here is a huge conflict of
interest.
The president will need to choose a
sympathetic character while the court is trying to decide whether
or not he's usurped power unconstitutionally.
He has every motivation to choose a nominee
who supports the notion that the executive branch should be more
powerful than the legislative-- that the president is the
ultimate authority and that Congress, the voice of the people,
doesn't matter at all.
I will not let this happen.
It's going to be very, very, very difficult
to get me to vote for a SCOTUS nomination from this president.
I'm not going to take it lying down and let
the president have his way.
I'm not going to let him change the entire
process of law in this country without one heck of a fight.
Will you stand with me as I do everything I
can to block President Obama's attempt to silence the opinion of
the American public?

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Peter, I hope you saw Ruth's email from yesterday. If not, just scroll down.

We have a great ad running in South Carolina, a great organization of motivated staff and volunteers, and very enthusiastic crowds everywhere we go.

I cannot overstate how important it is that you help us before February 20th.

We only have 4 days to go until the South Carolina primary and every single donation we receive between now and then will help us to keep our ads running and reach more voters.

[Please help by making a donation now of just $3 or more.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33583858:WjDm1AC5N:m:1:876315805:E2B269DEF1F87A10D233133D15081305:r)

Thank you and God Bless,

Ben

Sent from my iPhone

\-------Begin forwarded message-------

**From:** Ruth Sherlock
**Subject:** A fitting question for Presidents' Day:
**Date:** February 15, 2016
**To:** Ben Carson

| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33583858:WjDm1AC5N:m:1:876315805:E2B269DEF1F87A10D233133D15081305:r)
---

Peter,

Today is Presidents' Day, and as we look forward to this election year, it's worth looking back.

From Washington to Lincoln to Reagan, America's greatest presidents were those who both embodied and strengthened our unique American creed of freedom, equality, and justice for all.

Now it's time to choose our next president, and whether that person has the right values, vision and dedication to the Constitution is up to us.

After two disastrous terms of Barack Obama, with a seat to fill on the U.S. Supreme Court, and in a world that grows more dangerous by the day, our choice is more important than ever.

I decided to join Dr. Carson's team and lead his campaign here in South Carolina because his values, integrity, humility and life experience make him uniquely qualified to lead our nation.

Right now, we're doing everything we can to make that case to the people of South Carolina, because they will make their voices heard in just 5 days. We've built a deep grassroots effort across the state and the enthusiasm is undeniable.

**[You can help by ensuring that we have the resources to share Dr. Carson's message with every voter. Please watch our current ad and then donate just $3 to keep it running.](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33583858:WjDm1AC5N:m:1:876315805:E2B269DEF1F87A10D233133D15081305:r)**
**
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33583858:WjDm1AC5N:m:1:876315805:E2B269DEF1F87A10D233133D15081305:r)
---
**
As a South Carolinian, I know how seriously people take this responsibility. They are looking for someone who respects both the power and limits of the office, who will represent and fight for their values and principles, and who will tell the truth and do what's right even when it's difficult.

That person is Dr. Ben Carson -- [and with your support before February 20th](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33583858:WjDm1AC5N:m:1:876315805:E2B269DEF1F87A10D233133D15081305:r), the people of South Carolina will get him one step closer to the Oval Office.

Sincerely,

Ruth Sherlock
South Carolina State Director
Ben Carson for President

name: Rand Paul
subject: We can't let this happen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate
body:
Dear Patriot:

The unfortunate passing of Justice Scalia has
change the 2016 race dramatically.

The role of the Senate is undeniably more
important than it has been in recent years and the necessity of a
Republican majority is CRUCIAL.

President Obama and the Democrats have wasted
no time making a huge political statement of Scalia's vacancy.

President Obama thinks this is his big chance
to put an end to originalist interpretation of the Constitution.
He has made it clear to nominate a replacement -- a liberal
replacement -- and liberals in the Senate are forcing the idea
that it's the job in the Senate to confirm whoever the President
recommends.

Right now we have a GOP majority and we can
block a liberal replacement - and I will fight to do that.

But if Democrats win the Senate and lose the
White House in November, they still have the option to change the
entire path of our nation. And there won't be a single thing for
us to do about it.

While the Constitution mandates the new
Congress begins January 3rd, 2017, President Obama is still in
Office until January 20, 2017. That means they have two weeks for
the President to send a nominee and with a Democrat majority, the
Senate could apply the 'nuclear option' and vote in the nominee
with a simple majority.

That would be a complete nightmare.

I cannot stress this enough: losing the
Senate in November is not an option.

I do not believe a GOP majority should
confirm a Supreme Court nomination from President Obama -- and I
really, really don't want a Democrat majority to confirm one
either.

We have to do everything we can to make sure
the GOP maintains control of the Senate or we'll be looking at a
court that completely rejects Scalia's idea of originalism -- an
activist court that would be guided by political motivation
rather than the Constitution.

This has made it more clear than ever that
the role of the Senate is vital to maintaining liberty.

Patriot, I need your help to make sure I make
it back for another term in January to stand up for liberty in
Washington.

Without a strong Senate, we cannot ensure
that our courts are upholding the Constitution.
That's why I am more committed than ever to
another term for Kentucky and for this country.
Please stand with me today.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

subject: Mitch McConnell really said this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a campaign supported by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donors
body:
Vacancy is not an option, Senator McConnell | Friend --

When Justice Antonin Scalia passed away, he created a vacancy on the Supreme Court. Within hours of the announcement, Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell said that he would refuse to hold a confirmation vote, regardless of the nominee.

One of the constitutional responsibilities of the president is appointing Supreme Court justices -- and last time I checked, President Obama was still president. When he nominates a justice, Congress needs to hold a clean vote, period.

Waiting a year with the hopes that a Republican might win the presidency is irresponsible and shameful to our Constitution and our democracy. There are millions of people waiting on the Supreme Court to decide on issues like access to abortion, immigration, climate change, and more -- a vacancy on the court could end with too many 4-4 decisions and too much uncertainty.

Leaving a Supreme Court seat vacant for political reasons is something we shouldn't tolerate.

Ed

Peter,

Last night's debate was ugly, vicious, and not worthy of the American people.

There's a reason that the first word in my campaign slogan is "heal," and last night it was there for everyone to see. The cancer of divisiveness is corroding our politics and the soul of our nation and if we don't fix it, nothing else matters.

It's very easy to get pulled down into the mud. The media and our political class thrive on it. But I got into this race for bigger reasons, and I will continue to stay focused on the big picture.

Looking under the hood of what runs Washington, D.C. would cause any rational person to run in the other direction. For a time, I put myself in that category.

But this is about the future for our children and grandchildren. This is about the American people and the survival of our Republic -- and we simply cannot afford to lose this election.

If I have the honor of serving as your President, I will be accountable to all and beholden to none. My only goal will be to champion the average American whose voice has been ignored, and fight to defend our liberties, our values and our unique way of life.

Peter, we don't have to accept the way things are. We have the power to create real and lasting change, and I want to be the vessel through which you and all of your fellow Americans can create that positive change.

But we will only be successful if you are willing to continue to invest in this campaign. We've gone from 17 candidates down to 6 and our fight will only get more difficult.

[**I ask you to stand with me right now by making an urgent donation of just $3 or more.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33590619:WTKpcACqN:m:1:876315805:5510565F3092265B99F83AD734EE2F76:r)

Last night's debate was an ugly reminder of the nastiness and divisiveness of our politics. The South Carolina primary is now just 6 days away and we have an opportunity to reset the table.

We have a real chance to show the media and the political class that values and decency still matter, that solutions and substance still matter, and that "We the People" will never allow our country to be ripped apart.

[**Please, stand with me right now and make an urgent donation of any amount.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/33590619:WTKpcACqN:m:1:876315805:5510565F3092265B99F83AD734EE2F76:r)

Thank you for your faith in me, and your incredible dedication to this campaign.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

body:
#
Sisters and Brothers -
One of the reasons we are doing so well in this election is because the American people understand that you cannot change a corrupt political system by taking its money.
Our campaign is funded by almost 4 million individual contributions made by people like you responding to emails like this one. That allows Bernie to spend time doing what you expect a candidate to do: talking to voters.
By contrast, Hillary Clinton left the campaign trail today and is in New York City hosting a fundraiser with financial service executives where self-described "champions" give her campaign the maximum amount of money allowable under the law.
Here's the truth: The Clinton campaign would not be leaving the campaign trail unless they were finding it difficult to keep pace with our historic numbers of individual contributions. And they also wouldn't do it unless it was for a grotesque amount of money from a small number of super rich people. Probably at least $500,000.
**Let 's double that for Bernie before midnight tonight:**
[**Contribute $3 to our campaign today as a way of saying you have had ENOUGH of Wall Street buying our candidates and elections.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/corrupt-political-system?refcode=em160216full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/corrupt-political-system?refcode=em160216full")
[](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/corrupt-political-system?refcode=em160216full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/corrupt-political-system?refcode=em160216full")
There is no more important time for a big fundraising push. The Nevada caucus is in just four days. South Carolina is in 11 days, and Super Tuesday is two weeks from today.
After how far we've come and everything we've campaigned on, it'd be a terrible loss for our movement if we came up short because of a rush of Wall Street cash.
[**Contribute $3 to our campaign and let 's double what Wall Street contributed to the Clinton campaign today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/corrupt-political-system?refcode=em160216full "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/corrupt-political-system?refcode=em160216full")
This is the moment we've been waiting and preparing for. If we continue to stand together over these next few weeks, we're going to win.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver

| Ted Cruz Plans to Filibuster Any Supreme Court Nominee Made by President Obama [Add your name right now to stop Ted Cruz >>](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae22fc/738133e4/34cd6e66/7f83d648/2582132902/VEsH/ "http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/e160216b") Friend --

This should come as a surprise to no one: **the Republican presidential candidate who shut down the government in 2013 wants to pull a similar stunt to obstruct President Obama 's Supreme Court nominee for almost a year.**

name: Mike R., Dir, Trump MidAtlantic
subject: 14 Days. What will you do?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donald J
body:
Peter --

# 14 days!
A lot can happen in 14 days!
Elections are won and lost in 14 days!
### Today marks 14 days until the Virginia Primary.
Virginia is important because it the first of the critical “purple” states. Any candidate seeking to win the presidency MUST do well in Virginia Primary.
## What will you do in the next 14 days to Make America Great Again?
**There is only 1 way proven win an election:

Contacting Voters

There are only 2 ways proven effective to contact voters:**
**Walking**
**Talking**
**Walking:**
We must go door to door – with an organized walk list – to ask our neighbors who they are voting for. The answers MUST be recorded so that we can reach out again to Get Out The Vote.
**We are organizing Walking / Door Knocking this weekend.**
**Can you visit 14 people in your county and knock on their doors?**
\- Training is available via conference calls or in person.
\- The software runs on tablets and smart phones. Tablets are available from the campaign.
\- Walkers deploy on Saturday (Expected temp is ~60 degrees!) and, in some regions, Sunday also.
**\- Email**[**MidAtlantic@DonaldTrump.com**](mailto:MidAtlantic@DonaldTrump.com)**to register as a Walker.**
**Talking:
**We must call the undecided voters in Virginia and convince them to vote for Mr. Trump. This is the best, most effective, easiest way to Get Out The Vote!
**Can you call for 14 minutes each day from now until March 1?**
\- The system is simple and fun to use.
\- You just need a tablet or computer and a phone.
\- You can call from home or join a group phone bank. ([view locations here](https://donaldtrump.nationbuilder.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fvafortrump%2Fevents&e=8ff4c67fd343da79b63c0de3e94ed779&utm_source=donaldtrump&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=14_days&n=1))
**\- To start Talking, email****[MidAtlantic@DonaldTrump.com](mailto:MidAtlantic@DonaldTrump.com).**
The MidAtlantic Team (DC, MD, VA, WV) has 14 Days to win this election.

What will you do?

Join our GOTV team today!
\- Mike

Mike Rubino
Director, Virginia
MidAtlantic Team
Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.

Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.

---
